trim: Gasoline trims; VIN test anchor is LS
engine: Gasoline engines covered by the 2020 Malibu Owner's Manual: 1.5L L4 and 2.0L L4
transmission: CVT for 1.5L engine; automatic transmission for 2.0L engine

maintenance.service: Rotate tires and perform required services

interval.logic: Every 7,500 miles / 12,000 km; required service visit includes tire rotation if recommended, oil level and oil-life check, oil and filter change if needed, coolant and washer-fluid checks, and vehicle inspections.

maintenance.notes: Oil timing remains GM Oil Life System driven. Change oil and filter within 600 miles of CHANGE ENGINE OIL SOON and at least once per year.

interval.logic: GM Oil Life System; change within 600 miles / 1,000 km of CHANGE ENGINE OIL SOON, and at least once every year even if the message has not appeared.

maintenance.notes: If the oil life system is accidentally reset, service within 3,000 miles / 5,000 km since the last service.

maintenance.service: Check engine air filter life and replace if needed

interval.logic: At required service intervals; follow engine air filter life percentage/status where equipped.

maintenance.notes: If not equipped with the engine air filter life system, replace engine air cleaner filter per the table/footnote.

interval.logic: Every 22,500 miles / 36,000 km pattern in the Additional Required Services table, or every two years, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: More frequent replacement may be needed in heavy traffic, poor air quality, high dust, allergens, reduced airflow, fogging, or odors.

interval.logic: Table marks this inspection at 45,000-mile intervals in both normal and severe schedules.

maintenance.notes: Visually check fuel and vapor lines and hoses for proper attachment, connection, routing, and condition.

maintenance.service: Replace engine air cleaner filter if not equipped with engine air filter life system

interval.logic: Table marks replacement at 45,000-mile intervals; footnote states every four years, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: If driving in dusty conditions, inspect at each oil change or more often as needed.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs; inspect spark plug wires and/or boots

interval.logic: Normal and severe tables mark spark plug service at 97,500 miles and 150,000 miles in the 7,500-mile schedule grid.

maintenance.service: Drain and fill engine cooling system and power electronics cooling system

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles / 240,000 km or every five years, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: Use the coolant specified by the owner manual.

interval.logic: Every 150,000 miles / 240,000 km or every 10 years, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: Inspect for fraying, excessive cracking, or damage; replace if needed.
Time-based service from the maintenance schedule footnote.

interval.logic: Table marks every 15,000 miles; footnote states every 12 months, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: Replace sooner if visibility is reduced.

maintenance.service: Replace hood and/or body lift support gas struts

interval.logic: Table marks 75,000 and 150,000 miles; footnote states every 10 years, whichever comes first.

maintenance.notes: Manual says this service can be complex; see dealer.

maintenance.service: Change automatic transmission fluid, except 1.5L engine

interval.logic: Severe schedule only; table marks 45,000, 90,000, and 135,000 miles.

maintenance.notes: Applies to 2.0L engine automatic transmission severe schedule only; do not apply to 1.5L CVT.

maintenance.service: Change automatic transmission fluid and filter for 1.5L engine

interval.logic: Severe schedule only; table marks 45,000, 90,000, and 135,000 miles.

maintenance.notes: Applies to 1.5L CVT severe schedule only. Owner manual lists CVT fluid separately from 2.0L automatic transmission fluid.

interval.logic: Severe commercial use vehicles only; perform at every oil change.

maintenance.notes: Special Application Services item, not a normal passenger-use maintenance requirement.

applicability: VIN test target is 2020 Chevrolet Malibu LS
1.5L and 2.0L engines require separate transmission-service applicability
FWD passenger vehicles unless an item is explicitly marked severe commercial use

Severe schedule applies when mainly driven in heavy city traffic in hot weather, mainly driven in hilly or mountainous terrain, frequent trailer towing, high-speed or competitive driving, or taxi/police/delivery service.
validation_flags: Candidate rebuilt from Chevrolet's official 2020 Malibu Owner's Manual PDF.
Official source URL follows the GM Owner Center manual pattern and resolved successfully.
Previous malformed page-preview artifact for 2020_chevrolet_malibu.json was not used.
Service and Maintenance text extracted from document pages 302-315; rendered-page verification remains required before production.
Normal and severe schedule tables were extracted from the official PDF text; column alignment still needs human visual review.
Oil timing is GM Oil Life System driven and must not be reduced to a simple fixed-mile oil interval.
Severe transmission service is split by engine: 1.5L uses CVT fluid and filter; 2.0L uses automatic transmission fluid.
Severe commercial chassis lubrication is retained as conditional, not normal passenger-use service.
